The content mentions a strike, but our guidelines specify that "isStrike" should only be set to true if there’s an upcoming strike. In this case, it indicates an ongoing strike, so "isStrike" should be false. 

I need to ensure the JSON format matches the example exactly, without any extra text. The final output will be: {"isStrike": false}. Let's deliver this as the clear and concise answer!
